variants.title: Mann Filter WK 940/33 x Fuel Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P505982
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER fuel filters remove unwanted and damaging dirt particles from the fuel and thus prevent possible damage. Thanks to the highest degree of separation and sealing, the fuel filter ensures functional reliability and optimum protection during the entire maintenance interval.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: JIS D1617

variants.title: Donaldson P505982 Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P505982 Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: JIS D1617

variants.title: Fleetguard FS19735 Fuel Filter/Water Separator | Replaces the Donaldson P505982
variants.description: Fleetguard® FS19735 fuel water separator spin-on works to remove water and other particulates and ensures clean fuel is delivered to your engine.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: JIS D1617
